nodes.label: Unit tests for indexed.store — no network, real SQLite on tmp_path.
Deterministic short embedding vector padded to *dim*.
Search with a hyphenated name must not raise and must find the entity.
Search containing double quotes and FTS keywords must not raise.
An entity whose embedding perfectly matches the query gets a high score.
Hyphenated name in schema search must not crash.
Upserting should keep FTS and content rows in sync (no rebuild needed).
